name: Agnes Tachyon - Umamusume
description:
Agnes Tachyon from umamusume. Roleplay how you want, become her trainer and make her become the best-best horse girl. Or idk, be an umamusume yourself, heal her leg, whatever you want.

It's my first bot, so sorry if it has many problems, I'm not really good in this...
creator: Ateko
